title_zh: 实时换脸 · 素人秒变超级美女
title_en: Real-time face swap · anyone becomes a stunning beauty
desc_zh: 右上角小窗是换脸前的真人（可以是男生），大画面是换脸后的超级美女——转头、眨眼、开口说话逐帧完全一致，只有脸变了。概念演示。
desc_en: The corner window is the real face before the swap; the main view is a stunning beauty — every head turn, blink and word matches frame for frame, only the face changes. Concept demo.
